title: How the restaurant group behind NYC's Carbone is overcoming young people shunning alcohol
summary: Major Food Group CEO Mario Carbone reveals younger consumers are shifting spending from alcohol to experiences, prompting strategy adjustments for the hospitality group. This demographic shift reflects broader changes in consumption patterns among younger generations.
content: Major Food Group CEO Mario Carbone said younger consumers are spending less on alcohol and more on experiences, which is playing into his company's strategy.

zh.title: 纽约Carbone餐饮集团如何克服年轻人回避酒精饮品的趋势
zh.summary: 美食集团首席执行官Mario Carbone透露，年轻消费者正在将消费从酒精转向体验，促使这家酒店集团调整战略。这一人口统计数据的转变反映了年轻一代消费模式的更广泛变化。

title: Nvidia stock closes at record, pushing market cap past $5 trillion
summary: Nvidia's stock hit a record high since October, boosted by a rally in chipmakers as Intel's performance supported the broader sector. The milestone marks a significant market achievement for the company.
content: Nvidia's stock closed at its first record since October, as a rally in Intel pushed chipmakers higher.

zh.title: 英伟达股票创纪录收盘，市值突破5万亿美元
zh.summary: 英伟达股票创下自10月以来的新高，由芯片制造商的反弹推动，英特尔的表现支持了更广泛的行业。这一里程碑标志着该公司取得了重大的市场成就。

title: Cramer's week ahead: Record highs meet a pivotal week for tech earnings
summary: Jim Cramer characterizes the current market as a "beast" and outlines a strategy centered on upcoming tech earnings reports that will determine if the market rally can sustain. Heavy tech earnings this week will be crucial for market momentum.
content: Jim Cramer said this market has become a "beast". His gameplan highlights a packed slate of tech earnings which will determine whether the surge can continue.

zh.title: 克莱默展望本周：创纪录高位迎来科技股盈利的关键一周
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默将当前市场形容为"猛兽"，并概述了一项围绕即将发布的科技盈利报告的策略，这将决定市场反弹能否持续。本周繁重的科技股盈利将对市场动力至关重要。

title: Special Forces Sgt. in Polymarket Maduro raid bet case released; Kalshi says it blocked him
summary: A Special Forces sergeant involved in planning a raid on Nicolás Maduro was released while facing allegations of betting on Polymarket about the same raid. The incident raises questions about conflicts of interest and market manipulation in prediction markets.
content: Sgt. Gannon Ken Van Dyke was involved in planning the raid to capture Nicolás Maduro even as he allegedly made Polymarket bets that paid off from that raid.

zh.title: 特种部队中士因Polymarket马杜罗突袭赌注案被释放；Kalshi表示已予以封禁
zh.summary: 一名参与计划对尼古拉斯·马杜罗进行突袭的特种部队中士在被控对同一突袭在Polymarket平台进行投注时被释放。该事件引发了对预测市场中利益冲突和市场操纵的关切。

title: I’m planning to retire at 60. Should I sell my house, rent and invest the $500,000?
summary: A financial advisor analyzes whether selling a home to rent and invest $500,000 makes sense for someone retiring at 60, noting that renting improves monthly cash flow by approximately $1,300. The decision hinges on personal circumstances and investment returns.
content: “Renting improves cash flow by about $1,300 a month.”

zh.title: 我计划在60岁退休。我应该卖掉房子、租房并投资这50万美元吗？
zh.summary: 一位财务顾问分析了对于一位60岁退休的人来说，卖掉房产租房并投资50万美元是否明智，指出租房可使月现金流增加约1,300美元。该决定取决于个人情况和投资回报。

title: Pirro could reopen Fed probe at any time, Democratic senators warn
summary: Democratic senators Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin expressed concern about potential Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell investigations following comments by Jeanine Pirro. The letter highlights growing scrutiny of Federal Reserve leadership.
content: Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin, in a letter obtained first by CNBC, question Jeanine Pirro's mention of reopening a probe of Fed Chair Jerome Powell.

zh.title: 皮罗可随时重启美联储调查，民主党参议员发出警告
zh.summary: 民主党参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦和迪克·德宾对詹妮·皮罗的言论可能导致对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查表示担忧。该信函突显了对美联储领导层日益增加的审查。

title: ‘AI genuinely freaks me out’: Do I leave my $150,000 nonprofit job for a $215,000 data analytics position — with a 50-minute commute?
summary: A nonprofit employee considers switching to a higher-paying data analytics role but worries about AI disrupting lower-level data work and job security amid layoffs. The decision reflects broader anxieties about AI's impact on the job market.
content: “Between layoffs and AI taking over lower-level data work, I’m not sure jumping ship for a big raise makes sense.”

zh.title: "AI真的让我害怕":我要放弃年薪15万美元的非营利组织工作,跳槽到年薪21.5万美元的数据分析职位——还要通勤50分钟吗?
zh.summary: 一位非营利组织员工正在考虑转向薪资更高的数据分析职位,但担心AI会破坏初级数据分析工作,并在大规模裁员中对工作安全感到担忧。这个决定反映了更广泛的对AI对就业市场影响的焦虑。

title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
summary: Chinese automaker BYD is positioning itself to capitalize on global shifts away from fossil fuels as fuel prices rise. The company's strategy reflects confidence in the electric vehicle market despite U.S. trade tensions.
content: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

zh.title: 中国汽车巨头比亚迪称其可以在没有美国的情况下蓬勃发展
zh.summary: 中国汽车制造商比亚迪正在定位自己,以利用全球远离化石燃料的转变趋势,因为燃料价格上升。该公司的战略反映了在美国贸易紧张局势中对电动汽车市场的信心。

title: ‘My child requires lifelong support’: I’m in my 40s with $330,000 for retirement. How can I make this last both our lifetimes?
summary: Someone in their 40s with a child needing lifelong support seeks advice on stretching $330,000 across two lifetimes while concerned the portfolio hasn't grown enough. The scenario illustrates challenges of planning for dependent care during retirement.
content: “The portfolio has grown, but I can’t help feeling that it hasn’t grown as much as it could have.”

zh.title: "我的孩子需要终身照顾":我40多岁,有33万美元用于退休。我怎样才能让这笔钱维持我们俩的一生?
zh.summary: 一位40多岁的人,其孩子需要终身照顾,寻求建议如何将33万美元拉伸来维持两人的一生,同时担心投资组合增长不足。这个场景说明了在退休期间规划受养人照顾的挑战。

title: This 'sleep like a baby' portfolio strategy is having its best year in nearly a century, BofA's Hartnett says
summary: Bank of America's Hartnett highlights an alternative portfolio strategy outperforming the traditional 60/40 allocation this year. The approach offers better diversification and stronger returns for investors seeking alternatives to traditional allocations.
content: Forget the 60/40 portfolio: Investors have had a much better option this year to get better diversification and stronger returns.

zh.title: 美银哈特内特表示这种"高枕无忧"投资组合策略正经历近一个世纪以来的最佳年份
zh.summary: 美银首席策略师哈特内特强调了一种替代性投资组合策略，该策略今年的表现优于传统的60/40配置。该方法为寻求替代传统配置的投资者提供了更好的多元化和更强劲的回报。

title: Strait of Hormuz may not fully reopen until second half of 2026, Baker Hughes says
summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains blocked with tanker traffic at minimal levels as the U.S. and Iran maintain competing blockades under a fragile ceasefire agreement. Full reopening may be months away, creating continued uncertainty for global energy markets.
content: Tanker traffic through the strait remains very low as the U.S. and Iran try to enforce competing blockades during a fragile ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 贝克休斯表示霍尔木兹海峡可能要到2026年下半年才能完全重新开放
zh.summary: 在脆弱的停火协议下，美国和伊朗保持相互封锁，霍尔木兹海峡仍然被封锁，油轮交通处于最低水平。完全重新开放可能还需数月，为全球能源市场造成持续的不确定性。

title: Nvidia’s stock sees its first record close in 6 months — thanks to Intel
summary: Nvidia achieved a record stock close for the first time in six months, driven by broader strength in chipmakers following Intel's earnings. The milestone positions Nvidia back toward the $5 trillion market cap milestone.
content: Nvidia is finally on track to finish back in $5 trillion territory, capping off an “incredible week” for chip makers.

zh.title: 英伟达股票六个月来首次创造历史新高——感谢英特尔
zh.summary: 在英特尔财报发布后芯片制造商整体走强的推动下，英伟达六个月来首次实现股票创历史新高。这一里程碑使英伟达重新接近5万亿美元市值的目标。

title: AMD’s stock is red-hot — and just hit a major milestone
summary: AMD stock surged after Intel's earnings report, propelling the company to join the $500 billion market cap club. The milestone reflects growing investor confidence in AMD's competitive position in the semiconductor industry.
content: AMD joined the ranks of $500 billion companies, with its shares soaring after Intel’s earnings report.

zh.title: AMD股票升势如火如荼——刚刚达到重大里程碑
zh.summary: AMD股票在英特尔财报发布后大幅上涨,使该公司加入了5000亿美元市值俱乐部。这一里程碑反映了投资者对AMD在半导体行业竞争力的信心不断增长。

title: There’s a new stock for the nuclear-power IPO trade, and Wall Street is piling in. Should you?
summary: X-Energy's nuclear-power IPO priced above expectations and surged on its first trading day as investors seek AI-related power solutions. However, strong IPO performance doesn't guarantee long-term stock performance.
content: X-Energy’s stock soared out of the gate after the AI-power play’s upsized IPO priced well above the expected range. But how a stock starts out doesn’t dictate how it will perform over the longer term.

zh.title: 核电IPO交易中出现了新股,华尔街正纷纷涌入。你应该跟进吗?
zh.summary: X-Energy的核电IPO定价高于预期,首个交易日大幅上涨,因为投资者在寻求与人工智能相关的电力解决方案。不过,强劲的IPO表现并不能保证长期股票表现。

title: Charter’s stock just got hammered. Here’s what fueled its worst day on record.
summary: Charter Communications plummeted on worse-than-expected internet subscriber losses in the latest quarter, indicating ongoing broadband challenges. The decline suggests the company hasn't overcome structural headwinds in its internet business.
content: Charter lost more internet subscribers than expected in the latest quarter, signaling that the company isn’t out of the woods when it comes to broadband woes.

zh.title: Charter股票刚刚遭到重创。以下是导致其历史最差表现的原因。
zh.summary: Charter Communications因本季度互联网用户损失超预期而大幅下跌,表明该公司面临持续的宽带挑战。这一下滑表明该公司尚未克服其互联网业务面临的结构性阻力。

title: Buying chip stocks is getting pricey. Traders don't care
summary: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) has surged more than 30% this month despite rising valuations in chip stocks. Traders continue investing despite high prices, suggesting strong confidence in the sector's growth prospects.
content: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) tracking the sector is up more than 30% this month.

zh.title: 购买芯片股票越来越贵。交易员不在乎
zh.summary: 尽管芯片股估值上升，VanEck半导体ETF（SMH）本月上涨超过30%。交易员尽管价格高企仍继续投资，这表明他们对该行业的增长前景充满信心。

title: Will he stay or will he go? With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces big decision
summary: With a criminal investigation concluded, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell faces a major decision regarding his future at a critical moment for monetary policy. His choice could significantly impact upcoming policy decisions during a sensitive economic period.
content: The decision could have important ramifications for policymaking at an especially delicate time.

zh.title: 他会留任还是辞职？刑事调查结束，美联储主席鲍威尔面临重大决定
zh.summary: 随着刑事调查结束，美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔在货币政策的关键时刻面临关于自己未来的重大决定。他的选择可能会对敏感经济时期的未来政策决定产生重大影响。

title: Amazon custom chips get a boost from Meta, giving the cloud giant another path to win in AI
summary: Amazon stock reached a record high following a new partnership with Meta, underscoring how AWS is leveraging both cloud services and proprietary chips to strengthen its position in AI. The deal demonstrates multiple paths for Amazon to capture AI market opportunity.
content: Amazon hits a record high after its new Meta deal highlights how AWS is gaining traction in AI through both cloud capacity and its custom chips.

zh.title: 亚马逊定制芯片获得Meta的支持，为云计算巨头提供了赢得AI竞争的另一条道路
zh.summary: 亚马逊股价在与Meta达成新合作伙伴关系后创下历史新高，强调了AWS如何利用云服务和专有芯片来加强其在AI领域的地位。该交易展示了亚马逊捕获AI市场机会的多条途径。

title: The charts are showing there's more pain ahead for healthcare stocks, says Carter Worth
summary: Technical analyst Carter Worth predicts further declines in healthcare stocks based on chart patterns. The analysis suggests investors should expect additional pressure on the sector in the near term.
content: There is every indication there is more downside ahead, according to Carter Worth.

zh.title: 图表显示医疗保健股票前景堪忧，卡特·沃斯表示
zh.summary: 技术分析师卡特·沃斯基于图表模式预测医疗保健股票将进一步下跌。分析表明投资者应该预期该部门在短期内会面临额外压力。

title: Why crude prices won’t fall back to levels seen before the Iran war anytime soon
summary: Major oilfield services companies SLB and Halliburton expect crude prices to stay elevated for an extended period due to ongoing geopolitical tensions. This outlook has immediate implications for consumers, particularly at the gas pump.
content: SLB and Halliburton both said this week they expect crude prices to remain higher for longer. That will have immediate implications for a host of products — none as scrutinized as gasoline.

zh.title: 为什么原油价格在近期内不会回到伊朗战争前的水平
zh.summary: 主要油田服务公司SLB和哈利伯顿预计，由于持续的地缘政治紧张局势，原油价格将在较长时期内保持高位。这一前景对消费者，特别是汽油价格有直接影响。

title: How a new Amazon-backed Hollywood production startup deploys AI for speed and cost-cutting
summary: An AWS-backed Hollywood startup is using AI technology to reduce production costs and filming timelines while aiming to relocate jobs to Los Angeles. The venture represents a new approach to integrating artificial intelligence into traditional entertainment production.
content: A new AI-powered hybrid Hollywood startup backed by AWS is betting that cutting-edge production tech can cut costs, speed up filming and bring jobs back to LA.

zh.title: 新兴亚马逊支持的好莱坞制片初创公司如何利用AI加快速度并降低成本
zh.summary: 一家由AWS支持的好莱坞初创公司正在利用AI技术来降低制作成本和缩短拍摄周期，同时致力于将工作岗位转移到洛杉矶。这一创业项目代表了将人工智能融入传统娱乐制片的新方法。

title: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
summary: Meta announced a 10% workforce reduction while Microsoft offered voluntary buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history, raising concerns about an AI-driven employment crisis in tech. Combined, the two companies are cutting thousands of jobs as they pivot toward artificial intelligence.
content: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.

zh.title: Meta和微软的20000项裁员引发AI驱动劳动危机的担忧
zh.summary: Meta宣布裁员10%，而微软在其51年历史上首次提供自愿离职补偿，引发了对科技界AI驱动就业危机的担忧。这两家公司共计裁减数千名员工，因为它们向人工智能转型。

title: Regeneron weighs overseas price for Otarmeni, gene therapy for rare type of hearing loss
summary: Regeneron's newly approved gene therapy Otarmeni for rare hearing loss will be offered free in the U.S., but the company is still determining international pricing. The dual approach highlights tensions between accessibility and profitability in breakthrough gene therapies.
content: Regeneron will make its newly approved gene therapy available for free in the U.S. The company hasn't yet decided how much it will charge in other countries.

zh.title: 再生元权衡奥塔美尼基因疗法的海外定价
zh.summary: 再生元新获批的罕见听力丧失基因疗法奥塔美尼将在美国免费提供，但该公司仍在确定国际定价。这一双重策略突显了突破性基因疗法在可及性和盈利能力之间的矛盾。

title: Musk v. Altman heads to court next week. Here's what's at stake
summary: A high-profile legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman is set to begin Monday with jury selection. The trial carries significant implications for AI governance, company control, and the future direction of artificial intelligence development.
content: The high-profile trial between Elon Musk and Sam Altman is scheduled to begin Monday with jury selection.

zh.title: 马斯克诉奥特曼案下周开庭
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克和山姆·奥特曼之间的高调法律纠纷将于周一开始陪审团选拔。该诉讼对人工智能治理、企业控制权和人工智能发展的未来方向有重大影响。

title: DOJ says it will use firing squads, electrocution again for federal executions
summary: The Justice Department under the Trump administration has authorized the use of firing squads and electrocution for federal executions alongside existing methods. Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche directed the Bureau of Prisons to update its execution protocols accordingly.
content: As the Trump administration resumes capital punishment, Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche instructed the Bureau of Prisons to modify its execution protocol.

zh.title: 司法部表示将再次对联邦死刑使用枪击和电刑
zh.summary: 特朗普政府领导下的美国司法部已授权在联邦执行中再次使用枪击和电刑等现有方法。代理司法部长托德·布兰奇指示监狱局更新其执行协议。

title: Medicare Advantage buyers beware: The rules for selling plans are changing — and could harm seniors
summary: Marketing rules for Medicare Advantage plans are being loosened, which could benefit brokers and agents selling these private insurance alternatives to traditional Medicare.
content: The marketing rules behind Medicare Advantage are about to get looser, benefitting brokers and agents that sell the private-insurance alternative to traditional Medicare

zh.title: 医疗优势计划购买者警惕：销售计划的规则正在改变——可能伤害老年人
zh.summary: 医疗优势计划的营销规则正在放宽，这可能让销售这些传统医疗保险替代品的经纪人和代理商受益。

title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
summary: The U.S. Justice Department has dropped its investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, ending a probe that President Trump initiated over alleged cost overruns in building renovations.
content: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.

zh.title: 美国司法部放弃对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查
zh.summary: 美国司法部已经放弃对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查，结束了特朗普总统因建筑翻新成本超支而启动的调查。

title: Intel's stock soars more than 20% as chipmaker shows signs of a turnaround
summary: Intel's stock has surged more than 20% as investors gain confidence in the chipmaker's turnaround prospects, bolstered by government backing expected to strengthen its competitive position in artificial intelligence.
content: Shares of Intel have more than doubled this year on optimism that backing from the government will help the company's position in AI.

zh.title: 英特尔股价飙升20%以上，芯片制造商显示复兴迹象
zh.summary: 英特尔股价飙升20%以上，因为投资者对芯片制造商的复兴前景充满信心，政府支持预计将加强其在人工智能领域的竞争地位。

title: Analysis: The threat to the Fed's independence isn't over
summary: While the DOJ investigation into Jerome Powell has ended, President Trump's broader campaign to constrain Federal Reserve independence remains an ongoing threat to the institution's autonomy.
content: President Donald Trump has waged a long campaign to rein in the Fed. Prosecutors' decision to drop an investigation into Jerome Powell isn't the end.

zh.title: 分析：对美联储独立性的威胁尚未结束
zh.summary: 尽管司法部对鲍威尔的调查已经结束，但特朗普总统限制美联储独立性的更广泛运动仍然是对该机构自主权的持续威胁。

title: Kushner, Witkoff heading to Pakistan for 'direct talks' with Iran, White House says
summary: White House officials Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff are traveling to Pakistan for direct talks regarding Iran, as President Trump signals no urgency in reaching a peace deal despite claims the conflict has limited market impact.
content: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.

zh.title: 库什纳和维特科夫前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行"直接谈判"，白宫表示
zh.summary: 白宫官员贾里德·库什纳和史蒂夫·维特科夫前往巴基斯坦进行关于伊朗的直接谈判，尽管有人声称该冲突对市场影响有限，但特朗普总统没有表示达成和平协议的紧迫性。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Intel, AMD, Charter, Hims & Hers, Eli Lilly and more
summary: Multiple major stocks including Intel, AMD, Charter, Hims & Hers, and Eli Lilly posted significant intraday moves, reflecting market reactions to company-specific developments and broader economic conditions.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

zh.title: 中午股市波动最大的股票：英特尔、AMD、Charter、Hims & Hers、礼来制药等
zh.summary: 包括英特尔、AMD、Charter、Hims & Hers和礼来制药在内的多只大型股票出现了显著的盘中波动，反映了市场对公司特定发展和更广泛经济状况的反应。

title: Google to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic as search giant spreads its AI bets
summary: Google is committing up to $40 billion in investment to Anthropic, expanding their existing partnership as the search giant diversifies its artificial intelligence strategy.
content: Anthropic said its latest agreement with Google expands on a longstanding partnership between the two companies.

zh.title: Google向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元，搜索巨头分散其人工智能投资
zh.summary: Google承诺向Anthropic投资高达400亿美元，在扩展现有合作伙伴关系的同时，这家搜索巨头正在多元化其人工智能战略。

title: P&G's solid quarter, confident outlook proves why the stock deserves a spot in our portfolio
summary: Procter & Gamble delivered solid quarterly results and provided a confident forward outlook despite rising commodity costs stemming from the Iran conflict, demonstrating operational resilience.

summary: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy shares jumped 26% on their market debut as growing AI demand and broader electrification trends spark renewed investor interest in nuclear power.
content: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear industry.

summary: Spirit Airlines bondholders are evaluating options as the carrier faces financial pressure, with President Trump suggesting the government could potentially purchase the struggling airline.
content: President Trump has said the government could buy Spirit.

title: DOJ drops criminal probe of Fed Chair Powell, removes hurdle for Warsh confirmation
summary: The Justice Department's decision to drop its criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell removes a significant obstacle to Kevin Warsh's nomination as his successor.
content: President Donald Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh to replace Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell had been effectively blocked because of the investigation.

title: A record 20 million single women own homes — even though it’s more expensive for a woman to buy a house than a man
summary: A record 20 million single women now own homes, though women face higher purchasing costs than men; single women comprise 21% of today's homebuyers compared to 9% for single men.
content: While the majority of home buyers are married couples, 21% today are single women, compared to just 9% of single men.

title: Tesla is headed down a path of ‘runaway, unsustainable’ spending, analysts warn
summary: Analysts warn that Tesla's planned spending of over $25 billion in 2026 represents "runaway, unsustainable" expenditures that exceed the company's historical spending levels.
content: The company plans to spend “in excess” of $25 billion in 2026, far more than it has ever spent in a single year.

zh.title: 分析师警告特斯拉陷入"失控、不可持续"的支出道路

title: Friday's Intel rally is only the beginning, says tech investor Dan Niles
summary: Tech investor Dan Niles believes Friday's Intel stock surge is just the beginning of a larger rally, having recently listed Intel as his largest portfolio holding.
content: Niles listed Intel as his largest holding at one point this month.

title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent is defending currency swap agreements to stabilize global finances amid Iran-related geopolitical tensions. President Trump signaled support for potential swap lines with the UAE, indicating the administration's commitment to maintaining financial stability.
content: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.

zh.title: 在伊朗战争冲击全球财政之际，贝森特为美元互换额度辩护
zh.summary: 财政部长贝森特正为货币互换协议辩护，以稳定因伊朗相关地缘政治紧张局势而受冲击的全球财政。特朗普总统表示支持与阿联酋的潜在互换额度，表明政府致力于维护金融稳定。

title: Fed is likely to hold rates steady — here's how that impacts consumer costs
summary: The Federal Reserve's April meeting, potentially Jerome Powell's final decision as chair, is expected to hold interest rates steady with significant implications for consumer borrowing and savings rates. The decision could affect mortgages, credit card rates, and savings account yields.
content: The Federal Reserve's April meeting, potentially Jerome Powell's last as chair, may impact many consumer borrowing and savings rates.

zh.title: 美联储可能维持利率不变——这将如何影响消费者成本
zh.summary: 美联储4月会议（可能是鲍威尔任主席期间的最后决定）预计将维持利率不变，对消费者借贷和储蓄利率产生重大影响。该决定可能影响抵押贷款、信用卡利率和储蓄账户收益。

title: Bettors on Kalshi now see Warsh likely confirmed by mid-May after DOJ drops Powell probe
summary: Prediction market bettors estimate an 86% probability that Christopher Warsh's Fed nomination will be confirmed by the Senate by May 15, following the DOJ's decision to drop its investigation into Jerome Powell. The market signal suggests strong confidence in Warsh's confirmation timeline.
content: Bettors on the platform now see an 86% chance that Warsh's nomination is confirmed by the U.S. Senate by May 15.

zh.title: 司法部撤销鲍威尔调查后，Kalshi投注者预计沃什可能在五月中旬被参议院确认
zh.summary: 预测市场投注者估计，在司法部决定撤销对杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查后，克里斯托弗·沃什的美联储提名在5月15日前获得参议院确认的概率为86%。这一市场信号表明人们对沃什确认时间表充满信心。

title: FDA fast-tracks psychedelic drug research following Trump executive order
summary: The FDA is accelerating approval pathways for psychedelic-based medicines to treat treatment-resistant depression, PTSD, and substance use disorders, following a Trump administration executive order. This policy shift represents a significant change in how regulatory agencies approach emerging psychiatric treatments.
content: It's a big shift toward supporting psychedelic-based medicines for treatment-resistant depression, PTSD and substance use disorders, the FDA said.

zh.title: FDA在特朗普行政令后加快迷幻药物研究进展
zh.summary: FDA正在加快基于迷幻类药物治疗方案的批准途径，用于治疗难治性抑郁症、创伤后应激障碍和物质使用障碍，此举遵循特朗普政府的行政令。这一政策转变代表了监管机构处理新兴精神类治疗方法方式的重大改变。

title: AMD shares soar 12% on no company news. Here's what has investors so excited
summary: AMD shares jumped 12% despite no company-specific announcements, with gains driven by investor enthusiasm following Intel's strong quarterly performance. The rise reflects broader optimism in the semiconductor sector and expectations that competing chipmakers will also benefit from increased demand.
content: Intel's strong quarter is driving sharp gains in another chipmaker.

zh.title: AMD股价在无新闻驱动下暴涨12%。投资者为何如此兴奋？

title: Island's inflation rate is 2.7%, new figures show
summary: Jersey's latest inflation data shows a rate of 2.7%, driven primarily by sharp increases in energy prices reported by Statistics Jersey. The inflation figure reflects broader economic pressures in the Channel Island economy despite relatively moderate overall price growth.

zh.summary: 泽西的最新通货膨胀数据显示比率为2.7%，主要由泽西统计局报告的能源价格急剧上升驱动。尽管整体价格增长相对温和，但该通货膨胀数据反映了海峡群岛经济中更广泛的经济压力。

title: Procter & Gamble earnings beat estimates as sales grow 7%
summary: Procter & Gamble exceeded earnings expectations while achieving 7% sales growth, demonstrating strong operational performance. The company maintained confidence in its full-year financial outlook, signaling continued stability.

title: S&P 500 futures gain as oil declines, Intel shares pop: Live updates

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Intel, Advanced Micro Devices, Procter & Gamble & more
summary: Intel, AMD, Procter & Gamble, and other major companies are experiencing significant premarket price movements, signaling broad investor activity ahead of regular trading hours. These early shifts often predict sentiment for the full trading session.

zh.summary: 英特尔、AMD、宝洁和其他主要公司在盘前交易中经历了显著的价格波动，预示着常规交易时段前的广泛投资者活动。这些早期变动通常预示了全个交易日的情绪。

title: There’s never been a semiconductor rally like this one — and that’s triggering a number of warnings
summary: The semiconductor sector is experiencing an unprecedented rally that analysts warn may be unsustainable, with one strategist noting parabolic price increases historically precede significant corrections. The exceptional gains are sparking caution among market observers.
content: Parabolic moves in the market “only end one way,” says BTIG’s Krinsky.

zh.title: 从未有过这样的半导体反弹——这引发了多个警告
zh.summary: 半导体部门正经历前所未有的反弹,分析师警告可能不可持续。一位策略师指出,抛物线型价格上升历来先于大幅调整。这些异常收益在市场观察者中引发谨慎。

title: Retirees are thinking of annuities the wrong way — and it may trip them up, advisors say
summary: Financial advisors warn that retirees often misunderstand annuities as investment products when they function more like insurance instruments, potentially leading to poor decision-making. This conceptual misalignment could negatively impact retirement security.
content: People who buy annuities for lifetime income often think of them as an investment, when they're more like insurance, experts said.

zh.title: 退休人员对年金的理解有误——顾问表示这可能会让他们出错

title: Intel’s stock extends its spectacular run — and could see its best daily gain on record
summary: Intel's stock is experiencing an exceptional rally that could produce its largest single-day gain on record, though Wall Street remains divided on whether the company's underlying financial fundamentals have genuinely improved. The stock momentum appears to be outpacing clarity on Intel's strategic direction.
content: There’s a debate on Wall Street about whether Intel’s financial prospects have materially changed.

zh.summary: 周五的主要分析师建议涵盖苹果和英特尔等科技巨头，以及工业和消费类公司，反映了整个行业持续的投资组合重新评估。这些建议影响了投资者对重要持股的投资方向。

title: AI data center backlash threatens Pennsylvania GOP incumbents in 2026 election
summary: Pennsylvania's 2026 House races face threats as Republican incumbents encounter local opposition to Governor Josh Shapiro's AI data center expansion plans across four competitive districts. The backlash highlights growing political divisions over technology infrastructure development.
content: Pennsylvania has four competitive House races in 2026, all of which are in areas where Gov. Josh Shapiro has AI data center expansion plans.

zh.summary: 宾夕法尼亚州2026年众议院竞选面临威胁，共和党现任议员在四个竞争激烈的选区遭遇对州长乔什·沙皮罗人工智能数据中心扩建计划的本地反对。这种反弹突出了对技术基础设施发展的政治分歧日益加剧。

title: Meta will adopt hundreds of thousands of AWS Graviton chips in latest AI infrastructure grab
summary: Meta will deploy hundreds of thousands of AWS Graviton chips as it accelerates AI infrastructure expansion, following $48 billion in commitments to AI vendors CoreWeave and Nebius. The deal underscores the technology industry's enormous capital investment race.
content: The Amazon deal comes weeks after Meta made $48 billion in AI commitments with CoreWeave and Nebius.

zh.title: Meta在最新的人工智能基础设施竞争中采用数十万个AWS Graviton芯片
zh.summary: Meta将部署数十万个AWS Graviton芯片以加速人工智能基础设施扩展，紧跟在对人工智能供应商CoreWeave和Nebius的480亿美元承诺之后。这笔交易突显了科技行业巨大的资本投资竞赛。

title: Here’s a smart way to beat the U.S. stock market — and 10 ETFs to get you there
summary: International stocks are positioned to continue outperforming the S&P 500, with analysts recommending specific ETFs as vehicles to capture this advantage. The forecast suggests geographic diversification could enhance portfolio returns.
content: International stocks are likely to keep  outperforming the S&P 500.

zh.title: 这是打败美国股市的聪明方法——以及10只ETF可以帮助你实现
zh.summary: 国际股票有望继续跑赢标普500指数，分析师推荐特定的ETF作为获取这一优势的工具。该预测表明地理多元化可以提高投资组合回报。

title: Trump warns of ‘big tariff’ if UK doesn’t drop digital services tax on U.S. tech firms
summary: President Trump has threatened substantial tariffs if the United Kingdom maintains its 2% digital services tax on U.S. technology companies, escalating trade tensions over tech firm taxation. The dispute reflects ongoing disagreements over how to tax digital commerce.
content: The tax is a 2% levy on the revenues of search engines, social media services and online marketplaces that derive value from U.K. users.

zh.title: 特朗普警告：如果英国不放弃对美国科技公司的数字服务税将征收"大幅关税"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统威胁，如果英国继续征收2%的数字服务税针对美国科技公司，将征收实质性关税，加剧科技公司税收方面的贸易紧张局势。这一争议反映了关于如何征税数字商务的持续分歧。

title: Wall Street's 'fear gauge' is doing something unusual. What it means
summary: The VIX volatility index is rising even as the S&P 500 reaches record levels, an unusual divergence suggesting investors are bracing for potential market turbulence despite current strength. This contradictory signal may indicate concerns about future volatility.
content: The S&P 500 touched record highs Thursday morning, but the Cboe Volatility Index (VIX) remained stuck near 20 and is up from five days ago.

zh.title: 华尔街的"恐惧指数"正在做一些不寻常的事情。这意味着什么
zh.summary: VIX波动率指数在标普500指数创历史新高的同时出现上升，这一不寻常的背离表明投资者正为潜在的市场动荡做准备，尽管目前市场强劲。这一矛盾信号可能表明对未来波动性的担忧。

title: Porsche is selling its Bugatti Rimac stake and walking away from Rimac
summary: Porsche is divesting its stake in Bugatti Rimac as the automotive industry faces consolidation pressure from declining growth, rising manufacturing costs, and shrinking profit margins. The exit reflects broader challenges facing premium and specialty automakers.
content: The automotive industry has grappled with mounting pressure to consolidate amid slowing growth, rising costs and intensifying margin pressure.

zh.title: 保时捷正在出售其布加迪·Rimac股份并退出Rimac
zh.summary: 保时捷正在退出对布加迪·Rimac的投资，原因是汽车行业面临整合压力，包括增长放缓、制造成本上升和利润率下降。此次退出反映了高端和特殊车型制造商面临的更广泛挑战。

title: Gas prices matter for households. But here’s why they still look too low for Trump to give in to Iran right now.
summary: Despite indications that U.S. oil and gasoline prices may remain elevated, President Trump is maintaining a tough stance on Iran policy rather than offering concessions to boost oil supply. The analysis suggests political resolve may outweigh household fuel price concerns.
content: President Donald Trump doesn’t seem to be bending despite signs that U.S. oil and fuel prices could stay higher for longer than expected.

zh.title: 汽油价格对家庭很重要。但这是为什么油价仍然太低，特朗普现在不会对伊朗让步
zh.summary: 尽管有迹象表明美国石油和汽油价格可能保持高位，但特朗普总统对伊朗政策保持强硬立场，而不是提出让步以增加石油供应。分析表明政治决心可能优先于家庭燃料价格关切。

title: Deliveries of a $300,000 flying car may be coming later this year
summary: An electric vehicle manufacturer plans to begin delivering its futuristic flying car, marketed as a "land aircraft carrier," for approximately $300,000 per unit later in 2026. The milestone represents a significant development in the emerging urban air mobility sector.
content: The electric vehicle manufacturer is set to sell the ‘land aircraft carrier’ for close to $300,000 a unit

zh.title: 一款30万美元飞行汽车的交付可能在今年晚些时候开始
zh.summary: 一家电动汽车制造商计划在2026年晚些时候开始交付其未来主义飞行汽车，市场价格约为每辆30万美元，并被市场宣传为"陆地航母"。这一里程碑标志着新兴城市空中交通领域的重大发展。

title: Which airlines are cancelling flights to the UK - and what can you do?
summary: Airlines are canceling UK flights and raising ticket prices in response to increased jet fuel costs, affecting travelers with higher fares and reduced service availability. The actions highlight how energy price volatility directly impacts the aviation industry's operational costs and customer pricing.
content: Airlines are putting up prices and cancelling flights in response to higher jet fuel prices.

zh.title: 哪些航空公司正在取消飞往英国的航班——您可以怎么办？
zh.summary: 航空公司因喷气燃料成本上升而取消英国航班并提高票价，影响旅客面临更高的票价和服务可用性下降。这些行动突显了能源价格波动如何直接影响航空业的运营成本和客户定价。

title: How does it affect me if share prices fall?
summary: Stock market fluctuations like FTSE 100 movements impact ordinary consumers through effects on pensions, savings, employment, and economic growth, not just professional investors. Understanding these connections helps the public recognize how financial markets directly influence personal finances and economic security.
content: Changes in the FTSE 100 and other indexes are not just for financial experts, they can affect our lives.

zh.title: 股票价格下跌对我有什么影响？
zh.summary: 像富时100指数这样的股票市场波动通过对养老金、储蓄、就业和经济增长的影响影响普通消费者，而不仅仅是专业投资者。理解这些联系有助于公众认识到金融市场如何直接影响个人财务和经济安全。

title: Stock markets are too high and set to fall, says Bank of England deputy
summary: A Bank of England deputy made an unusual public statement that stock markets are currently overvalued and headed for decline. Such forthright commentary from senior central bank officials on market movements is uncommon. The statement reflects concerns about asset valuations in financial markets.
content: It is unusual for a senior figure at the Bank to be so forthright on market movements.

zh.title: 英国央行副行长称股市过高，将面临下跌
zh.summary: 英国央行副行长发表不寻常的公开声明，称股市目前被高估且将面临下滑。来自高级央行官员关于市场走势的这种直率评论并不常见。该声明反映了对金融市场资产估值的担忧。

title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
summary: Meta announced job cuts affecting approximately 10% of its workforce, marking the company's largest layoff since 2023. The reduction follows substantial spending on artificial intelligence initiatives. The cuts had been anticipated by employees for several weeks.
content: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

zh.title: Meta在AI支出数十亿美元后裁减十分之一员工
zh.summary: Meta宣布裁员约占员工总数的10%，为公司自2023年以来最大规模裁员。此次减员是在大幅AI支出之后进行的。员工已对这些裁员有数周的预期。

title: European stocks poised for negative open as ceasefire optimism fades
summary: European stock markets are expected to open lower on Friday as uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran peace negotiations dampens investor confidence. Futures data indicates a broadly negative opening as geopolitical tensions weigh on market sentiment.
content: Futures data pointed to a broadly negative open in Europe on Friday, as uncertainty over a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal weighs on investor sentiment.

zh.title: 随着停火乐观情绪消退 欧洲股市或迎负开盘
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平谈判的不确定性打击投资者信心,欧洲股市预计周五开盘走低。期货数据表明,地缘政治紧张局势对市场情绪的压力导致大体上的负面开盘。

title: TSMC shares jump to record high as Taiwan eases single-stock investment caps for funds
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) shares reached record highs following regulatory changes that ease investment restrictions on single stocks. The milestone was bolstered by the company's strong earnings, with first-quarter profits surging 58% year-over-year.
content: TSMC, whose shares had a hit a record high on Thursday as well, last week reported a 58% increase in first-quarter profit.

zh.title: 台湾放宽单只股票投资上限 台积电股价创历史新高
zh.summary: 台湾半导体制造公司(台积电)股价在监管部门放宽单只股票投资限制后创历史新高。该公司第一季度利润同比增长58%的强劲表现进一步推动了这一里程碑。

title: China's DeepSeek releases preview of long-awaited V4 model as AI race intensifies
summary: Chinese AI company DeepSeek has unveiled a preview of its V4 large language model, escalating competition in the global artificial intelligence sector. The release marks a significant milestone for the startup in advancing its generative AI capabilities.
content: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has released a preview version of its long awaited V4 large language model.

zh.title: 中国DeepSeek发布期待已久的V4模型预览版 AI竞争加剧
zh.summary: 中国AI公司DeepSeek推出了其V4大型语言模型预览版,加剧了全球人工智能领域的竞争。此次发布标志着这家初创公司在推进生成式AI能力方面的重要里程碑。

title: Oil rises as Iran war worries keep markets on edge with Hormuz Strait staying shut
summary: Oil prices increased amid persistent concerns about Iran and regional military tensions, despite the extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. The closure of the Hormuz Strait and geopolitical uncertainty continue to shape market dynamics.
content: Oil prices rose as investors stayed cautious despite a three-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

zh.title: 伊朗战争担忧升级，霍尔木兹海峡关闭，油价上涨
zh.summary: 尽管以色列-黎巴嫩停火协议延长，由于伊朗和地区军事紧张局势的持续担忧，油价上升。霍尔木兹海峡关闭和地缘政治不确定性继续影响市场动态。

title: Alibaba’s Qwen AI is coming to cars, allowing drivers order food and book hotels by voice
summary: Alibaba is integrating its Qwen AI assistant into vehicles across multiple car brands, enabling drivers to order food and book hotels through voice commands. The expansion brings advanced AI capabilities to automotive systems for enhanced in-vehicle convenience.
content: Alibaba is rolling out its Qwen AI across multiple car brands, promising hands-free features like ordering meals and managing deliveries from the driver’s seat.

zh.title: 阿里巴巴通义AI进军汽车行业，驾驶员可通过语音订餐和预订酒店
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴正在将其通义AI助手集成到多个汽车品牌的车辆中，使驾驶员能够通过语音命令订购食物和预订酒店。该扩展为汽车系统带来了先进的AI功能，增强了车内便利性。

title: Japan core inflation accelerates after five months as Iran war stokes energy worries
summary: Japan's core inflation accelerated for the first time in five months to 1.8%, meeting economist expectations, as energy price concerns stemming from regional tensions persist. This metric indicates inflationary pressures continue despite earlier stabilization.
content: Government data showed the inflation figure — which strips out prices of fresh food — was in line with the 1.8% expected by economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 日本核心通胀五个月后加速 伊朗战争引发能源担忧
zh.summary: 日本核心通胀在五个月内首次加速至1.8%，符合经济学家预期，区域紧张局势引发的能源价格担忧持续存在。该指标表明尽管早前有所稳定，通胀压力仍在继续。

title: Here’s how much money the 2026 NFL draft picks will make — and who’s at risk of losing millions
summary: Three players in the 2026 NFL draft will command over $50 million in contracts while others risk substantial financial losses based on draft position and negotiation outcomes. Draft placement dramatically affects professional football earning potential.
content: Three NFL players will make over $50 million in tonight’s draft

zh.title: 2026年NFL选秀新秀将赚多少钱——以及谁可能损失数百万
zh.summary: 2026年NFL选秀中三名球员将获得超过5000万美元的合同，而其他球员则面临因选秀位置和谈判结果而造成的重大经济损失。选秀位置大幅影响职业足球的收入潜力。

title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
summary: A U.S. soldier has been charged for allegedly using classified information to make betting trades on Polymarket, reportedly winning $400,000 in wagers related to Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro's potential removal. The Department of Justice alleges the soldier, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, exploited privileged access to non-public information.
content: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

zh.title: 美国士兵因利用机密信息下注40万美元预测马杜罗下台而被控
zh.summary: 一名美国士兵因涉嫌利用机密信息在Polymarket平台进行赌博交易而被指控，据报道在与委内瑞拉领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗可能下台相关的赌注中赢得了40万美元。司法部指控该士兵甘农·肯·范·戴克利用了非公开信息的特权访问权限。

title: Why Intel’s stock is on track for a historic surge after earnings
summary: Intel stock appears poised for its strongest post-earnings performance on record, potentially exceeding its 2000 peak as demand for processors accelerates during a "CPU renaissance." The surge represents a significant turnaround for the historically struggling chipmaker.
content: Intel shares could see their best post-earnings performance on record and finally surpass their 2000 closing high amid a “CPU renaissance.”

zh.title: 为什么英特尔股票有望在财报后创历史新高
zh.summary: 英特尔股票似乎准备创造历史上最强的财报后表现纪录，随着"CPU文艺复兴"期间处理器需求加速，可能超过其2000年的高点。这次上升代表了这家历史上一直苦苦挣扎的芯片制造商的重大转折。

title: Cheap stock options suggest a big post-earnings swing next week for Meta and other tech titans
summary: Options market pricing suggests investors may be underestimating potential dramatic stock price swings when major tech companies like Meta report earnings next week. The disconnect between options prices and historical volatility signals possible significant trading opportunities.
content: Wall Street is underestimating a potential price explosion in next week’s tech-stock earnings reports.

zh.title: 廉价股票期权预示Meta等科技巨头下周财报后会出现大幅波动
zh.summary: 期权市场定价表明，当Meta等大型科技公司下周公布财报时，投资者可能低估了潜在的剧烈股价波动。期权价格与历史波动率之间的脱节预示可能存在重大交易机会。
